siteConfig.metadataDescription: Virtual Pilates classes built entirely around you. With custom programming and personal attention, every movement connects to how you want to move and feel.

fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what's on your mind...

homePage.metadataTitle: Relish Pilates — Yummy, challenging, feel-good Pilates
homePage.metadataDescription: Virtual Pilates classes built entirely around you. With custom programming and personal attention, every movement connects to how you want to move and feel.

hero.heading: Yummy, challenging, feel-good Pilates
paragraphs: Virtual Pilates classes built entirely around you. With custom programming and personal attention, every movement connects to how you want to move and feel.
Join me in building strength, awakening flexibility, and moving through life with more freedom and ease.

about.heading: Strengthen. Stretch. Savor.
paragraphs: Relish Pilates is all about sharing movement as a powerful and nourishing way to connect to yourself.
With a personal guide designing, leading and adapting your workout as you move, you get the most out of every moment.
And you can have some time that's truly all about you, what you want for your body and how you want to feel in it.

items.title: Schedule a good time
bullets: Book a time for your Pilates workout
Create an account so you can make changes just in case
Check your confirmation email for everything you need

items.title: Tell me about you
bullets: Fill out a quick form before your session (included in your confirmation)
Relax — I'll use what you share to create a workout made just for you

items.title: Zoom your workout
bullets: Grab your mat and find some space to move your body
Log into Zoom at your scheduled time

faqPage.metadataDescription: Find answers to common questions about Relish Pilates sessions and scheduling.
faqPage.heading: Frequently Asked Questions

items.title: What is Pilates?
items.body: Pilates is a low-impact exercise method that focuses on building strength, flexibility, and body awareness through controlled movements.

items.title: Do I need experience?
items.body: No experience necessary. Our sessions are customized to your level and goals, whether you're a beginner or advanced practitioner.

pricingPage.metadataDescription: Explore Relish Pilates session packages, including intro and multi-session pricing options.
pricingPage.heading: Pricing options
highlights: Custom programming built around your body
notes: Sessions expire 6 months from purchase date
